name: Project Plan
description: Manage project plans and automate task execution with registered AI agents. Supports GitHub, GitLab, Jira, Azure DevOps, and local plans.

maxLogEntries.label: Max Log Entries Per Plan
maxLogEntries.help: Maximum number of log entries to keep per project plan (default: 800).

itemTimeoutMinutes.label: Item Timeout (minutes)
itemTimeoutMinutes.help: Maximum time the agent is allowed per plan item before it is marked as failed (default: 60).

logSanitizeMode.label: Log Sanitize Mode
logSanitizeMode.help: When 'mask', plan log messages strip emails/phones and truncate titles (KVKK/BDDK compliance). Default: off.

logSanitizeMaxTitleChars.label: Log Sanitize Max Title Chars
logSanitizeMaxTitleChars.help: Maximum chars kept per title/description when sanitizing (default: 40).

overloadMaxRetries.label: Overload Max Retries
overloadMaxRetries.help: How many times a transient-overload agent run is retried per item (default: 2).

overloadRetryBaseDelayMs.label: Overload Retry Base Delay (ms)
overloadRetryBaseDelayMs.help: Base wait between overload retries. Linear backoff applies (default: 2000).

transientCapacityMaxDelayMs.label: Transient Capacity Max Delay (ms)
transientCapacityMaxDelayMs.help: Upper bound on wait time parsed from capacity Retry-After signals (default: 120000).

providerBaseUrls.label: Provider Base URL Overrides
providerBaseUrls.help: Override provider API base URLs for on-prem, proxy, or GitHub Enterprise deployments.

fsBrowseAllowedRoots.label: FS Browse Allowed Roots
fsBrowseAllowedRoots.help: Absolute directories that the Project Path browser is allowed to enter. Empty = unrestricted (legacy).

webhookSecrets.label: Webhook Secrets
webhookSecrets.help: Per-provider shared secrets used to verify inbound webhook POSTs. Leave blank to disable a provider.
